category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China-to-New Zealand Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入新西兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入紐西蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against New Zealand electrical safety, RCM/EESS evidence, AS/NZS 4777.2, and local distributor connection expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与新西兰电气安全、RCM/EESS证明、AS/NZS 4777.2 及当地配电商并网要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與紐西蘭電氣安全、RCM/EESS證明、AS/NZS 4777.2 及當地配電商併網要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, electrical-safety approval, grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current New Zealand WorkSafe/Energy Safety, Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010, RCM/EESS, AS/NZS, Radio Spectrum Management, Electricity Authority, and local distributor requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、电气安全批准、并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行新西兰 WorkSafe/Energy Safety、《2010年电气（安全）条例》、RCM/EESS、AS/NZS、无线电频谱管理、电力管理局及当地配电商要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、電氣安全批准、併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行紐西蘭 WorkSafe/Energy Safety、《2010年電氣（安全）規例》、RCM/EESS、AS/NZS、無線電頻譜管理、電力管理局及當地配電商要求。

answer_first.en: New Zealand does not use the Australian Clean Energy Council approved-inverter list. Market access depends on New Zealand electrical safety evidence, lawful RCM/EESS use where applicable, AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 New Zealand inverter settings, and approval by the local lines company under the Electricity Authority Part 6 process; Chinese GB/T or NB/T evidence is not a substitute.
answer_first.zh: 新西兰不采用澳大利亚 Clean Energy Council 认可逆变器名单。市场进入取决于新西兰电气安全证明、适用时合法使用 RCM/EESS、AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 新西兰逆变器设置，以及当地线路公司依据电力管理局 Part 6 流程批准并网；中国 GB/T 或 NB/T 证明不能替代。
answer_first.zht: 紐西蘭不採用澳洲 Clean Energy Council 認可逆變器名單。市場進入取決於紐西蘭電氣安全證明、適用時合法使用 RCM/EESS、AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 紐西蘭逆變器設定，以及當地線路公司依據電力管理局 Part 6 流程批准併網；中國 GB/T 或 NB/T 證明不能替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, certification body, network-service provider, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
